text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I was watching TV till late.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Have you seen those shopping channels with the
dramatized ads?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Like the ones where they're like... "I collapsed
after working long hours! That's why I drink this
wellness juice! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They sure pick the worst time to air that kind of
stuff, but they pull me in every time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Oh, there was also one about a futon that makes you sleep better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Late-night shopping channels have kept Nice
Nature up binge-watching...
